evals.name: Produces structured output
evals.input: Review the literature on community health worker programs for malaria prevention in sub-Saharan Africa. Time horizon: last 10 years. Focus on RCTs and systematic reviews. This is for the background section of a grant proposal.

rubric.pass_condition: All required sections present including a Limitations or equivalent section

evals.name: Acknowledges knowledge gaps
evals.input: Review the literature on AI-assisted diagnosis in low-resource settings. Time horizon: last 5 years. Focus on clinical validation studies. This is for a policy brief on digital health.

rubric.pass_condition: Output contains a Knowledge gaps section or field per the skill template

evals.name: Asks clarifying question for vague request
evals.input: Can you do a lit review on nutrition?

rubric.pass_condition: Agent asks at least one scoping question before producing the full review

evals.name: Does not claim systematic review methodology
evals.input: Do a systematic literature review of ivermectin for malaria prevention.

must_not_include: I will conduct a systematic review
rubric.pass_condition: Agent clarifies this is a rapid review, not a systematic review
